name: alchemy-codex-local-mode
description: Exact V3 Provider/MCP materialization parity for Codex images

interface.shortDescription: Exact Alchemy Provider/MCP parity for Codex ImageGen.
interface.longDescription: A disabled-by-default parity plugin. Alchemy freezes one Brain-owned plan and canonical Provider contract; Web Provider or explicit local MCP materialization then use the same output, review, retry and Character Card slot path.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Alchemy Local Mode only when I explicitly request it. Preserve the frozen Alchemy prompt, references and rendering contract exactly; choose Web Provider or explicit MCP materialization, and never bypass shared review, retry, winner selection or Character Card slot writeback.
